title: bihai hirsuta
intro: Bihai hirsuta, also known as Long Dan Cao, is a plant species native to China and used in traditional Chinese medicine. This perennial plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bihai hirsuta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Bihai hirsuta is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
